overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval harbor city. The character moves from a sailing ship deck through a shipyard area and along cobblestone waterfront streets, engaging in brief combat with dock workers before continuing through the bustling harbor district.

agents.ego_description: walking along the ship's deck railing, observing the medieval harbor city and passing sailing vessels in the distance

entered.detail: wooden deck of the large sailing vessel with weathered planks
large wooden ship's wheel with metal accents
distant stone towers and red-roofed buildings of the harbor city
tall stone tower with conical roof in the distance
cluster of buildings with distinctive red tiled roofs

segments.scene_description: Geralt stands on the deck of a sailing ship, looking out across the water toward a medieval harbor city. The camera pans across the skyline showing stone towers and red-roofed buildings while walking along the wooden railing of the ship.

events.description: Geralt engages in melee combat with shirtless dock workers on the ship deck

agents.ego_description: fighting unarmed dock workers with melee attacks, knocking them to the ground

notable_agents.action: shirtless dock worker attacking with fists
second dock worker approaching to join the fight

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the ship deck, Geralt encounters hostile dock workers and engages in hand-to-hand combat. The wooden deck is scattered with cargo and ropes as the fight unfolds near the ship's wheel.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden shipyard dock with timber warehouses

events.description: exits the sailing ship onto the wooden dock area of the shipyard

agents.ego_description: walking off the ship onto the wooden dock, passing through the shipyard area with timber buildings

notable_agents.action: dock worker in red trousers walking along the dock

entered.detail: large half-timbered warehouse with wooden beams and stone foundation
tall wooden scaffolding structure for ship construction
stone arch gate leading deeper into the dock district

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the ship and walks along the wooden dock planks of a busy shipyard. Timber-framed warehouses line the right side while wooden scaffolding rises on the left, with workers moving about the area.

events.description: ground surface changes from wooden dock planks to cobblestone along the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the wide cobblestone waterfront path with the harbor on the left side

notable_agents.action: group of townspeople walking along the promenade

entered.detail: wide cobblestone path running alongside the water with wooden posts
large wooden crane structure for loading ships
small wooden boats moored along the quay wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide cobblestone waterfront promenade bustling with townspeople. Small fishing boats are moored along the stone quay wall to the left, while a large wooden harbor crane stands prominently against the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow harbor alley with stone stairs

events.description: enters narrower cobblestone street with stone stairs and taller enclosing buildings

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps through a narrow harbor street, passing guards in red uniforms

notable_agents.action: guards in red uniforms standing watch along the wall
townspeople walking up the stairs ahead

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading upward through the narrow street
tall stone and timber buildings creating a narrow corridor

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a cobblestone alley with stone stairs leading upward. Guards in red uniforms stand watch along the right wall as Geralt ascends through the enclosed street, with the harbor now visible only in glimpses behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the confined deck of a sailing ship into the expansive, bustling streets of a medieval harbor city. It begins with a pan across a skyline of stone towers and red-roofed buildings from the ship's railing before moving deeper onto the wooden deck, where the camera follows a hand-to-hand combat encounter amidst scattered cargo and ropes. As Geralt leaves the vessel, the scene shifts to the wooden planks of a shipyard lined with timber-framed warehouses and rising scaffolding. The environment then opens into a wide cobblestone waterfront promenade filled with townspeople, fishing boats, and a prominent harbor crane. Finally, the path narrows into an enclosed cobblestone alley where the camera ascends stone stairs past guards in red uniforms, leaving the open harbor behind.
